headline: 5 Relatively Secure And Cheap Dividend Stocks, Yields Up To 8% (April 2026)
summary: This article is part of our monthly series where we highlight 5 large-cap, relatively safe, dividend-paying companies offering significant discounts to their historical norms. Read it here.

headline: Poland, Romania Ordered to Honor Vaccine Deal with Pfizer
summary: Pfizer Inc. (NYSE:PFE) is included among the 15 Cheapest Stocks with Highest Dividends. On April 1, Reuters reported that a Belgian court ordered Poland and Romania to take delivery of €1.9B ($2.2B) worth of COVID-19 vaccines made by Pfizer Inc. (NYSE:PFE) and BioNTech. The case has been building for some time. Pfizer brought the lawsuit […]
